signals.npcLine: Market pulse down, shadows stretch across all sectors.
signals.questPulse: Scan for fading crypto shards amid spreading dread.
signals.worldFeed: Global digital assets bleed value; trust fractures.
signals.clueEvent: Fear spikes as coin counts swell but confidence wanes.

signals.npcLine: New tokens churn, but none break past the noise.
signals.questPulse: Trace the static behind low-signal cryptos rising silently.
signals.worldFeed: Thousands of coins alive, few move the dial.
signals.clueEvent: Clusters form around zero-score tokens hiding deeper risks.

signals.npcLine: Sentiment index crawls near despair — expect chaos.
signals.questPulse: Decode the fear pattern spreading through data nodes.
signals.worldFeed: Market mood falters, casting long digital shadows.
signals.clueEvent: Emoji flickers show rising fear, signal suppressed hopes.

signals.npcLine: Watch trending cryptos—hidden shifts behind quiet ranks.
signals.questPulse: Investigate silent surges in weird token clusters.
signals.worldFeed: Top trenders flicker weakly; new players lurk unknown.
signals.clueEvent: Signals note fluctuations; quiet storms brewing beneath.

signals.npcLine: Whispers on street: trading floors grow colder by hour.
signals.questPulse: Gather rumors—fear chills even the boldest traders.
signals.worldFeed: Insider chatter warns decline, some ready to bail.
signals.clueEvent: Silence falls in data corridors, tension thickens.
